settings.text: Beat the heat this summer with JASPAL’s Summer Special and enjoy 25% off on 2 or more selected items from 24 March 2026 - 19 April 2026.

HOW TO GET A SPECIAL OFFER

  • Shop category: 
  • Women/Summer Special
  • Men/Summer Special
  • Accessories/Summer Special
  • The discounted price will be displayed on the checkout page.
  • *This promotion cannot be combined with any other discounts or promotions.

TERMS AND CONDITIONS APPLY

  • By participating in this promotion, you confirm that you have read and agreed to the terms and conditions outlined on our website. For more information, please visit: www.jaspal.com/policies/terms-of-service
  • Once your order is confirmed, it cannot be modified or canceled.
  • The company reserves the right to reject any returned or exchanged items, including promotional items, in any circumstance.
  • Shipping cost is not included.
  • The offers cannot be exchanged for cash or other items or transferred to others.
  • Find further details about our returns and exchanges policy at www.jaspal.com/policies/refund-policy
  • For additional information, don't hesitate to contact us at Tel: 02-118-2000 or email: customerservice@jaspal.co.th. Our office hours are Monday through Sunday, 09:00 to 18:00.
